sourcesContent:
<template>
  <el-container class="main-layout">
    <!-- 顶部导航栏 -->
    <index-header></index-header>
    <el-container>
      <!-- 侧边导航栏 -->
      <index-aside></index-aside>
      <!-- 主内容区域 -->
      <el-main class="main-content">
        <router-view></router-view>
      </el-main>
    </el-container>
  </el-container>
</template>

<script>
import IndexHeader from '@/components/index/IndexHeader'
import IndexAside from '@/components/index/IndexAsideStatic'
export default {
  name: 'Index',
  components: {
    IndexHeader,
    IndexAside
  }
}
</script>

<style lang="scss" scoped>
.main-layout {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  bottom: 0;
}

.main-content {
  padding: 20px;
  background: #f5f7fa;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
</style>
